title: App Settings - General - Licenses
scenario: Verify third-party software licenses with Source and License links are visible under App Settings > General > Licenses and in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to App Settings > General > Licenses.
Observe the screen for the "Third-party Software" headline.
Verify that a list of licenses is displayed below the headline.
For each license entry, check that a "Source" link is present.
For each license entry, check that a "License" link is present.
Exit the app and open the device's Phone Settings.
Navigate to Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
Verify that the same list of licenses is present in this section.
expected: The \"Third-party Software\" headline and the full list of licenses are visible under App Settings > General > Licenses. Each license entry includes both a \"Source\" link and a \"License\" link. The same licenses are also present under Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
